title: TerastalMons
description: An Addon adding terapagos and its terastal form to the game
body:
Explore the secrets of area zero and discover the legendary pokemon terapagos in cobblemon
this is an addon that adds terapagos and its terastal form to the game, upon entering battle terapagos will switch to its terastal form

terastalization will eventually be added for other pokemon using a side mod, however it will be a while before that part of this is released

-Warning- This addon is in its very early stages, the following bugs are already know, if you find any more inform me and ill do my best to fix them

Bugs: 
- terapagos does not have its signature abilitys or move (this will be fixed when 1.5 comes out)
- terapagos cant spawn in the wild (i havent decided on where it should spawn yet, so if you have any ideas let me know)
